---
title: "Site map"
format: html
---

## Site Map

-   [Mapping Open Research Networks](../index.html)
-   [Introduction to Network Analysis](../Intro-networks/intro-learning_outcomes.html)
-   [Setting up R for Network Analysis](../R_setup/R-learning_outcomes.html)
-   [Code-along exercise: the University of Jelly](../Code-along/code-learning_outcomes.html)
-   [Describing Networks](../Theory/theory-learning_outcomes.html)
-   [About](../about.html)
